body: PARKED: [tool_surface_incomplete] Rally sub-agent hit the same Agent-tool-unavailable wall as Drive A; stopped before spending tokens on the same failure. Resume via /orb:drive 2026-05-24-brownfield-spec-migration in a fresh top-level session — design is fully laid down.

drive completed: 10/10 ACs APPROVE. reconcile_card_maturity + walker top-level Transform extension. PR #31 merged squash. Review verdict APPROVE, merge state queued. Closes brownfield-migration-hardening rally — all 3 children shipped.
